title: Extra Weapons
description: A mod that adds 5 new weapons to Minecraft.
body:
This mod adds **5 powerful weapons** to Minecraft, each with unique abilities.

You will need [Player Animator](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/playeranimator/files/5698757) in order to run it :)

## 🍀 Lucky Sword  
A blade of pure chance! Every hit applies a **random effect**, which could either **buff you or debuff your enemy** or summon structure and entities.

![Two player, one of them has the lucky sword in hands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05203fa6fb84caab037dff1fa91297a9dcc593c2.webp)

## 🪓 Dual Axe  
A mighty **two-headed axe** that allows you to perform a **spinning attack**, dealing area damage to surrounding enemies! 

![A player spinning with the dual axe in hands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41ff65a56582b793b548c0dc4d48b678802f809a.jpeg)

## ⚔️ Ambi Sword  
A **versatile weapon** that lets you **switch between four different attack styles** via an in-game menu. Adapt to any situation with ease!  

![Menu ambi sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01b682b8f44e336324fe958afa51f7ae16a9437a.jpeg)

## 🟣 End Katana  
Harness the power of the End! This katana grants **dash attacks** and **teleportation**, making you an unpredictable force on the battlefield.  

![End katana](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa2cf56d2e36acfb0ba2d3f3c81e768c1d810a96.jpeg)

## ✨ Real Wand  
A mystical wand that **fires glowing orbs** of energy. If your target has the **Glowing effect**, the damage of your orbs is **doubled**. And you can make them glow by hnitting them with the weapon in your hands.
